title: add_group_member_capped: BEGIN DEFERRED vs IMMEDIATE
description: store.rs add_group_member_capped uses pool.begin() (DEFERRED) not BEGIN IMMEDIATE. This is the known nie-kef6.29 issue — COUNT + INSERT is not truly atomic on SQLite with DEFERRED because another writer can interleave between COUNT and INSERT. The current code uses pool.begin() which is BEGIN DEFERRED; it would need BEGIN IMMEDIATE to guarantee the cap. This is already tracked.
